question_text:
In commit 1fe8a85 on 2026-07-10, you wrote line 29 of gradebook/analytics.py:
29:     if p > 100:

Consider changing `100` to `99`.

After changing the upper-bound check from `p > 100` to `p > 99`, what observable behavior changes for a fractional input strictly between 99 and 100, and why?
